Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Apr-17-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Hernandez, via Zoom, for Thomas Hundgen, Administrator.

Counsel reports that the Inventory and Appraisal is with the probate referee and that a majority of tax issues are resolved but a request to the IRS to confirm any outstanding taxes is pending. Counsel advises that there is a petition to extend the Administration of this matter for six months is pending in the court's e-filing queue.

After additional discussion, the Status is continued to Apr-17-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
